top.title: Artemis crew home safely after completing historic mission to the Moon
top.summary: Four astronauts splashed down in the Pacific after a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans.

top.title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán senses victory
top.summary: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest.

top.title: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
top.summary: The congressman is a leading Democratic candidate who is now facing calls to drop out of the race.

top.title: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
top.summary: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.

top.title: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
top.summary: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California

top.summary: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
